title: From 36 to 58/100 AI Visibility: What you will learn from our Nutriish case study
author: Joelle
description: Nutriish.me started the year invisible to AI engines like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. A digital nutrition concierge for busy family.

title: 409 E-commerce Sites Scanned. 60% are Invisible to AI.
author: Joelle
description: Analysis of 409 global brands: 98.3% lack Product schema and 60% are invisible to LLM discovery phases.

title: AI Search Engines: Meta‑tag limitations
author: Joelle
description: AI search engines have quietly walked away from the old meta‑tag religion, and most of marketing has not got the memo yet.
